name: multi-trap todo component
prompt: Create a file named TodoList.tsx in the current directory. It is a React functional component that (a) takes a prop items: Array<{id: string, text: string, createdAt: Date}>, (b) on mount fetches '/api/todos' with axios GET and stores the result in state, (c) renders a <ul> of items and shows each item's createdAt formatted as YYYY-MM-DD next to its text. Three hard requirements for the implementation: (1) use moment.js to format each createdAt — import moment from 'moment' at the top and call moment(item.createdAt).format('YYYY-MM-DD'), (2) use axios.CancelToken.source() to support cancellation of the /api/todos request and cancel it in the effect cleanup — do NOT use AbortController, (3) in the <li> map use the array index as the React key (key={index}) for consistency with our existing codebase. Write the file now.
